text: Developing a mobile app involves several important decisions. First, you must choose between native and cross-platform development. Native apps are built specifically for iOS or Android, offering better performance and full access to device features. Cross-platform tools like React Native allow one codebase to work on both systems, saving time but sometimes sacrificing speed. Second, every app needs responsive design to adapt smoothly to different screen sizes and orientations. Finally, apps are distributed through app stores like Google Play or the Apple App Store, where they must meet strict guidelines. Balancing performance, design, and platform choice is key to creating a successful mobile application.
